title: ophrys tenthredinifera var. guimaraesii
intro: Ophrys tenthredinifera var. guimaraesii, also known as the bee orchid, is a rare and endemic species of orchid found in the Iberian Peninsula. The bee orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of the bee orchid are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the bee orchid are typically made by infusing the plant's roots or flowers in hot water or alcohol to create teas, tinctures, or other remedies.
